questionHtml:
What is the order of reaction with respect to A, given the following reaction mechanism?

A + B → AB      fast

AB + A → A2B   slow

A2B → A2 + B   fast


A.  0

B.  1

C.  2

D.  3

meta.title: What is the order of reaction with respect to A, given the following reaction mechanism? A + B → AB fast AB + A → A2B slow A2B → A2 + B fast A. 0 B. 1 C. 2 D. 3
